no: Adds items and tactical challenges to BG1. Find the vault on Bear River (north of Gnoll Stronghold) island. Roxanne's EET update. Known warning: ADD_WORLDMAP_LINKS uses invalid from_node (~N~), WeiDU defaults to all nodes. Non-fatal, travel links work correctly. INSTALLED WITH WARNINGS — DDGAME03.BAF PARSE ERROR (SUMMON_SKELETON_WARRIOR3 not in spell.ids at compile time). Local fix applied: replaced with CLERIC_ANIMATE_DEAD in TDDz BAF files.

cl.m: Added from Infinity Insanity WeiDU logs

conflicts.reason: BG1NPC EXTEND_TOPs CENTEOL.BCS, changing its structure so VaultEET's REPLACE_BCS_BLOCK for ocenteol-ee.baf no longer matches. VaultEET's Centeol dialog trigger patch is silently skipped. Non-fatal — vault quest still works.

sum: Adds a new underground dungeon complex accessible from BG1, with traps, puzzles, and treasure. A classic dungeon-crawl experience.

co.n: The Vault (Ikki's rework for EET compatibility)
co.tp2n: The Vault (Ikki's rework for EET compatibility)
co.no: Main quest component. INSTALLS WITH WARNINGS: REPLACE_BCS_BLOCK cannot find ocenteol-ee.baf pattern in CENTEOL.BCS. Cause: BG1 NPC Project EXTEND_TOPs CENTEOL.BCS first (953→2180 bytes), breaking VaultEET's expected block match. Centeol's vault-related script patch doesn't apply. Non-fatal; mod quest works, only Centeol's dialog trigger is unpatched.

co.n: The Vault's item upgrades - Compatibility with Item Revisions. Recommended for consistency if you plan to install IR main component later
co.tp2n: The Vault's item upgrades - Compatibility with Item Revisions. Recommended for consistency if you plan to install IR main component later
co.no: Item Revisions compatibility patch. Install if planning to use IR main component later. Installs cleanly.
